text: Technology has changed the way people communicate in the modern world. Technology has made communication faster and more efficient for many people. People can now communicate with other people across the world using technology. Technology helps people share information and ideas with other people. Many people use technology to communicate every day in the modern world. Technology has become an important part of modern communication for many people. People rely on technology to stay connected with other people around the world. Technology continues to change the way people communicate with each other. The impact of technology on communication is significant for many people. Technology will continue to shape the future of communication for people everywhere.
